targets.note: Strong fit for retail traders and the first broker-connectivity candidate.
Important for full-service investor workflows and long-term portfolio users.
Useful once the import pipeline and account linking model are stable.
Good future addition once the initial brokerage connectivity path is proven.

syncRuns.note: Approval-first sync run is waiting on quantity confirmation before holdings are allowed to overwrite the saved portfolio snapshot.
One symbol-matching issue pushed this run into the broker review queue instead of silent import.
CSV fallback remains the safest universal path until token storage and broker-linked sync are fully trustworthy.

linkedAccounts.note: Token handshake is staged, but one final holdings verification is still required before this account can be treated as a trustworthy linked path.
Sandbox linkage exists for posture checks, but symbol and quantity review still runs through the approval-first queue before any overwrite is trusted.
CSV fallback remains the dependable account-linking path until live broker adapters are verified end to end.

reviewItems.issue: Two holdings changed quantity since the last sync
reviewItems.action: User confirmation required before saved portfolio is overwritten.

reviewItems.issue: One symbol came back with low-confidence matching against canonical assets
reviewItems.action: Move the row into review instead of silently importing it.

reviewItems.issue: Average price missing for one imported row
reviewItems.action: Ask user to verify via broker statement or keep the existing saved value.

activityLog.title: Broker sync preview ready
activityLog.detail: Seeded connection targets, sync runs, and review rows were attached to the signed-in preview broker workspace.
